_comment: Delivery channel config. Credentials read from env vars — never hardcode tokens here.

whatsapp._note: Uses Twilio WhatsApp sandbox for testing. pip install twilio
whatsapp._setup: 1. Sign up at twilio.com  2. Go to WhatsApp sandbox  3. Send join code to +14155238886  4. Set env vars above

slack._setup: 1. api.slack.com/apps → Create App  2. Enable Incoming Webhooks  3. Add to workspace, pick channel  4. Set webhook env vars above

archive_only._note: Always active — briefings always saved to data/briefings/YYYY-MM-DD/ even if delivery fails.
